text:
Market today: Risk-on tone continues — Iran strike headlines are sparking Monday relief rallies per the data. That helps tech and growth names short-term, but geopolitical noise can reverse fast. Your margin exposure means a sudden mood flip hits harder than it looks.

Your holdings: AVGO is your biggest problem — down 14.66%, your largest position, and flagged TRIM. That loss is amplified on margin; it needs a size cut now, not later. PLTR is down 11.08% and flagged SELL — no reason to hold a loser with that tag on margin. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history; even a small move against you can be sharp and fast, so size it accordingly.

Watch: 1) Whether the Iran-rally tailwind holds through the session — tech rallies on relief but fades if news turns. 2) AVGO price action around your $336 stop — a break there on margin is a real pain event.

Bottom line: Cut PLTR, trim AVGO — protecting capital on margin beats being right eventually.
